channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Anthropic says Google to pump $40 bn into AI startup
item.description: Google is planning to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic, the artificial intelligence firm confirmed Friday, expanding a long-standing alliance between the two companies. The investment builds on a partnership in which Anthropic will use custom Google chip… [Intel, Anthropic, Alphabet]

item.title: Google AI strategy: Why is the tech giant betting up to $40 billion on AI competitor Anthropic
item.description: ​Google Anthropic investment explained: Google's parent company, Alphabet, is significantly boosting its AI presence by committing up to $40 billion to AI startup Anthropic. This substantial investment, building on prior funding, underscores the intensifying … [Alphabet, Anthropic]

item.title: Google is investing up to $40 billion in a company that is beating Gemini. That is the point.
item.description: Summary: Google is investing up to $40 billion in Anthropic ($10B cash now at $350B valuation, $30B conditional on performance targets) plus five gigawatts of compute over five years, bringing its total commitment to ~$43B. The deal arrives as Anthropic’s rev… [Anthropic, Alphabet, ServiceNow]

item.title: Intel stock surge 28% to record high: how did a $8.9 billion Trump Intel stake become $28 billion, and what is Intel doing to dominate the AI boom?
item.description: Intel stock surge just hit a historic peak. Shares of Intel jumped nearly 28% in one session. A $8.9 billion U.S. stake in Intel is now worth nearly $36 billion. That is a gain of about $28 billion in months. The entry came near $20 per share in August 2025. … [Intel, ServiceNow]

item.title: Terafab explained: Elon Musk’s $5 trillion–$13 trillion AI chip megaproject in Texas
item.description: Elon Musk’s Terafab project aims to build massive AI chip fabs in Texas using Intel 14A tech, powering Tesla cars, robots and SpaceX data centres. [Intel, Tesla]

item.title: Intel keeps capex steady as it shifts spending toward capacity expansion
item.description: Intel is holding its 2026 capex broadly flat year over year, not because of reduced ambition, but because of a strategic reallocation of spending toward equipment that directly boosts chip output. Executives signaled that existing factory space is sufficient … [Intel]

item.title: Nvidia Stock Buy or Sell in 2026: AI Dominance Fuels Strong Buy Consensus Despite High Valuation
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. — Nvidia Corp. remains one of the most compelling yet polarizing investment stories in 2026, with Wall Street analysts overwhelmingly recommending investors buy shares of the AI chip leader even as the stock trades at elevated valuations f… [Nvidia]

item.title: AMD Stock Buy or Sell in 2026: AI Momentum Fuels Bullish Outlook Despite Valuation Risks
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. — Advanced Micro Devices Inc. shares have delivered strong gains in 2026, but the question of whether to buy, sell or hold the semiconductor giant remains a hot debate on Wall Street as the company rides the artificial intelligence wave wh… [Intel, AMD]

item.title: Elon Musk lays out Terafab AI chip project plan
item.description: Elon Musk announced Tesla will utilize Intel's 14A process for its ambitious Terafab chip project in Texas. This advanced complex aims to produce chips for Tesla vehicles, Optimus robots, and AI data centers, with initial research fab construction underway on… [Intel, Tesla]
